stack: React19+Vite+Tailwindv4 / Cloudflare Pages Functions / D1 / JWT / SWR / Playwright

issues.finding: Hardcoded plaintext test credentials: 'an123', 'mai123', 'admin123'
issues.fix: Use env vars or a secrets manager for test credentials

issues.finding: SQL injection in e2e db.ts: string interpolation in shell exec + SQL query (testId interpolated). Connects to remote D1.
issues.fix: Use parameterized queries for e2e DB operations

issues.finding: GET /api/classes has no auth check — returns full class list without authentication
issues.fix: Add data?.user check, return 401 if not authenticated

issues.finding: In-memory rate limiter (Map) resets on Worker cold start — bypassable
issues.fix: Use Cloudflare KV for persistent rate limit state

issues.finding: No JWT refresh/revoke mechanism. Logout just clears cookie — stolen tokens valid for 24h.
issues.fix: Add token denylist in KV, or implement refresh token rotation

issues.finding: D1 database_id hardcoded in config (best practice: use env var)
issues.fix: Move to .dev.vars or environment-specific config

issues.finding: N+1: loop issues separate INSERT for each answer (1 exam = 20 DB round-trips)
issues.fix: Batch INSERT: INSERT INTO ... VALUES (...), (...), ...

issues.finding: N+1: DB INSERT fired every 8 words in streaming loop
issues.fix: Accumulate chunks in memory, flush once after controller.close()

issues.finding: Inconsistent response shape: me.js returns {user}, others return raw arrays. chat.js returns {threads} then {threadId}.
issues.fix: Adopt consistent envelope: {data: ...} or raw arrays

issues.finding: 500 error response uses Cache-Control: public, max-age=10 via profile:'dynamic'
issues.fix: Use profile:'nocache' for error responses

issues.finding: 500 error uses profile:'dynamic' — caches error responses
issues.fix: Use profile:'nocache' for error responses

issues.finding: No pagination on 7 list endpoints — unbounded result sets
issues.fix: Add ?limit=&?offset= params, default limit=20

issues.finding: POST: no title/type/status validation
issues.fix: Add null check for title, validate type enum, guard status

issues.finding: Missing 201 status on resource creation (cachedJson defaults to 200)
issues.fix: Pass {status: 201} to cachedJson on POST-create

issues.finding: ~42 :any usages — no shared TypeScript interfaces for API responses
issues.fix: Create src/types/api.ts with typed response interfaces

issues.finding: ErrorBoundary exists but NOT imported in App.tsx — dead code
issues.fix: Import and wrap Suspense fallback in App.tsx

issues.finding: Empty/naked catch blocks — auto-submit silently fails (user thinks answer saved)
issues.fix: Add console.error in catch or proper error state

issues.finding: console.error in source (production leak)
issues.fix: Replace with proper error state or toast

issues.finding: Async handlers without return type annotations
issues.fix: Add explicit return types (Promise<void>, etc.)

issues.finding: lucide-react ^0.454.0 installed but NEVER imported anywhere in source
issues.fix: Remove from dependencies

issues.finding: @types/node ^25.5.0 — unusually high Node type version for Cloudflare Workers runtime (Node 18-20)
issues.fix: Pin to @types/node@^20

issues.finding: Duplicate filename 'classes.js' in different subdirectories
issues.fix: Rename admin/classes.js to adminClasses.js or add barrel index

issues.finding: Duplicate filename 'stats.js' — same collision risk
issues.fix: Rename to adminStats.js or add barrel index

issues.finding: Empty directory — abandoned UI scaffold
issues.fix: Delete or populate with UI components

issues.finding: .env.example missing — no onboarding doc for JWT_SECRET
issues.fix: Create .env.example with JWT_SECRET=your-secret-here

issues.finding: .env entry missing — local .env could be accidentally committed
issues.fix: Add '.env' to .gitignore

issues.finding: Hardcoded production baseURL — E2E breaks if prod is down
issues.fix: Use process.env.PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL ?? 'http://localhost:8788'
